title: Egyptian Mussel Toast
description: A simple and flavorful dish combining the freshness of mussels with the crunch of toast, all in a spicy and gooey Egyptian-inspired sauce.
instructions: Rinse the mussels and remove any broken shells.
Heat the spicy Egyptian sauce in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the mussels to the saucepan and cook until they start to open.
Transfer the mussels to a baking dish and top with the gooey sauce.
Place the toast slices on top of the mussels.
Bake in the oven for 5-7 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
